problem id: b102a8a8
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(7) AND NOT SHL(4)

examples:
  10001101 -> 00000110
  00001010 -> 00000101
  00011011 -> 00001101
  00110000 -> 00011000
  11010100 -> 00101010
  01111100 -> 00111110
  10001100 -> 00000110
  00100111 -> 10000011

query: 00010101
predicted answer: 10001010
